diagrams.title: Complexity Class Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between P, NP, NP-Complete, and NP-Hard classes
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how problem classes relate and understand containment

diagrams.title: NP-Completeness Proof Chain
diagrams.description: Shows how reduction works to prove new problems NP-complete
diagrams.purpose: Understand transitive reduction and how new problems are proven NP-complete

diagrams.title: Polynomial vs Exponential Growth
diagrams.description: Graph comparing growth rates of different time complexities
elements: Shows crossover point where exponential becomes impractical
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why polynomial time is the practical boundary
